  children={"Get Supply Plan Programs for Realm and HealthArea and RealmCountry"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/dropdown/program/sp/filter/healthAreaAndRealmCountry/realm/{realmId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of supply plan programs for a realm and health area and realm country

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"realmId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"healthAreaId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"realmCountryId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"HealthAreaAndRealmCountryDTO_DropDownView"}}},"description":"The health area and realm country for the programs to retrieve","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"active":{"type":"boolean"},"code":{"type":"string"},"currentVersionId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"healthAreaIdList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"id":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"idString":{"type":"string"},"label":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":"circular(BaseModel_DropDownView)"},"title":"BaseModel_DropDownView"},"labelId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"label_en":{"type":"string"},"label_fr":{"type":"string"},"label_pr":{"type":"string"},"label_sp":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Label_DropDownView"},"programTypeId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"realmId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"SimpleProgram_DropDownView"}}}},"description":"Returns the list of programs for a realm and health area and realm country"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_DropDownView"}}},"description":"Internal error that prevented the retrieval of the programs"}}}
>
